title: Samsung R&D India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Samsung R&D India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
